message:
Merge pull request #3080 from kubestellar/fix/nightly-playwright-timeout

🐛 fix: prevent nightly cross-browser Playwright timeout

files.patch:
@@ -48,7 +48,7 @@ jobs:
     name: Cross-Browser (${{ matrix.browser }})
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 20
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
@@ -84,7 +84,7 @@ jobs:
           npx wait-on http://localhost:4173 --timeout 60000
 
       - name: Run Playwright tests (${{ matrix.browser }})
-        run: npx playwright test --project=${{ matrix.browser }}
+        run: npx playwright test --project=${{ matrix.browser }} --retries=0 --timeout=30000
         env:
           PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL: http://localhost:4173
